title: Shibarium Bridge - REKT
relevance_summary: Bridge withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that initiates a withdrawal from a bridge contract when the underlying blockchain is not producing blocks.
prevention.trigger: WITHDRAWAL -> bridge contract when blockchain is not producing blocks

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that initiates a withdrawal from a bridge contract when the underlying blockchain is not producing blocks.
summary: The Shibarium bridge experienced a failure due to the blockchain not producing blocks, leading to stuck funds. A guard could have prevented this by blocking withdrawals when the blockchain is not functioning properly.
